name: phase-1-http-go-retrieval
description: Live Gemini retrieval evals for the HttpGo repository.

questions.question: How does RequestFromReader handle partial reads and incomplete requests?
How are HTTP headers parsed, normalized, and combined when duplicate headers appear?
How does the response writer send chunked response bodies and trailers?
How does the server accept TCP connections, parse requests, and pass them to the handler?
How are /httpbin routes proxied and streamed back using chunked transfer encoding?
Which routes return 400, 500, or 200 responses, and where are those responses written?
